c1.speaker: narrator
c1.line: The lodger leans in before Gary says anything at all.

c2.speaker: ferris
c2.line: You have the look of a man who knows about the map.

c4.speaker: ferris
c4.line: Edmund Vale's treasure. Sealed in the capsule, waiting fifty years. Ferris Mott has followed this legend across four counties and one regrettable marsh. And now the capsule is "empty"? Empty. Sure. SURE.

c5.speaker: narrator
c5.line: He winks. Then, in case the first one was lost in the post, he winks again.
